topic: The dive reflex: how cold water resets your heart rhythm
caption: Discover the powerful dive reflex! 🌊 Did you know cold water can reset your heart rhythm? 💖 Learn how this natural response can improve your cardiovascular health. 📚 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who loves cold showers! 🚿 Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health.
